name: pii-breach-benchmark-realworld-v4
description: Fourth-generation synthetic breach-review benchmark with OCR-hostile scanned packets, mixed ZIP archives, nested forwarded submissions, multi-entity household evidence, and operational decoys designed to resemble real review traffic.
